name: space-manager
description: Firefox extension that treats Container Tabs as workspace-like spaces.

scripts.check:manifest: node -e "try { JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('manifest.json','utf8')); console.log('manifest.json OK'); } catch(e) { console.error('Invalid JSON'); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.check:js: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const getAllFiles = (dir) => { if (!fs.existsSync(dir)) return []; return fs.readdirSync(dir).reduce((files, file) => { const name = path.join(dir, file); return fs.statSync(name).isDirectory() ? [...files, ...getAllFiles(name)] : [...files, name]; }, []); }; const files = ['background.js', ...getAllFiles('background'), ...getAllFiles('popup')].filter(f => f.endsWith('.js')); files.forEach(f => { const res = require('child_process').spawnSync('node', ['--check', f], {stdio: 'inherit'}); if (res.status !== 0) process.exit(1); }); console.log('JS Syntax OK');"
scripts.check: npm run check:manifest && npm run check:js && npm run lint
scripts.build: npm run check && web-ext build --source-dir . --artifacts-dir web-ext-artifacts --filename "space-manager-{version}.xpi" --overwrite-dest --ignore-files ".git/**" ".github/**" "node_modules/**" "web-ext-artifacts/**" "package.json" "package-lock.json" "CHANGELOG.md" "README.md" "LICENSE" ".gitignore" ".DS_Store" "Thumbs.db"
scripts.version: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const pkg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json','utf8'));const manifest=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('manifest.json','utf8'));manifest.version=pkg.version;fs.writeFileSync('manifest.json', JSON.stringify(manifest, null, 2) + '\n');console.log('Updated manifest.json to', pkg.version);"
